A former space traffic controller, '''Grotto Werribee''' was a young [[Human/Legends|Human]]. He was an [[Information broker/Legends|infochant]] in [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] and was in the crowd viewing the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]].

==Biography==
Werribee was a young [[Human/Legends|human]] with black stripes on the face that remained on [[Mos Espa/Legends|Mos Espa]] around [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]]. Once upon a time he was a junior traffic controller at a large freight company. He said there was no protocol in connection with [[Hangar|Docking Bay]] that he did not know.

In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], Grotto was mainly active as an [[Information broker/Legends|informant]]<ref name="CCG" /> and attended the [[Boonta Eve Classic/Legends|Boonta Eve Classic]] at the [[Mos Espa Grand Arena/Legends|Mos Espa Grand Arena]] stands.<ref name="TPM">{{Film|I}}</ref>
